text.title: rag Procedure
text.summary: Six-step build procedure for production RAG.

step.name: ingest-and-chunk
step.action: Load (unstructured/llama-index), chunk by doc type (r1), attach metadata, deduplicate (cosine>0.97).

step.name: embed-and-store
step.action: Batch-embed; upsert into vector DB; verify count.

step.name: retrieve-hybrid
step.action: Run hybrid search; top-K=20 by default.

step.name: rerank
step.action: Cross-encoder or Cohere rerank; take top-5.

step.name: generate-with-citations
step.action: Compose context (highest-score first); call LLM with "answer-only-from-context" prompt; require [Source: filename, page] citations.

step.name: validate-and-gate
step.action: Parse citations, intersect with metadata; compute faithfulness; if below 0.8, queue for review.
step.output: final RAG answer object matching schema
